JobGroups.template:
defaults:
  x86_64:
    machine: qemu
    priority: 70
products:
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-iommu-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-iommu
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hw-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-hw
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-optiplex-legacy-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-optiplex-legacy
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-optiplex-uefi-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-optiplex-uefi
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-vp4670-legacy-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-vp4670-legacy
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-vp4670-uefi-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-vp4670-uefi
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v1-legacy-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-hpt630v1-legacy
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v1-uefi-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-hpt630v1-uefi
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v2-legacy-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-hpt630v2-legacy
    version: '4.2.3'
  qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v2-uefi-x86_64:
    distri: qubesos
    flavor: install-iso-hpt630v2-uefi
    version: '4.2.3'
scenarios:
  x86_64:
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-optiplex-legacy-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: optiplex
      - aem-setup:
          machine: optiplex
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: optiplex
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: optiplex
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-optiplex-uefi-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: optiplex
      - aem-setup:
          machine: optiplex
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: optiplex
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: optiplex
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-vp4670-legacy-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: vp4670
      - aem-setup:
          machine: vp4670
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: vp4670
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: vp4670
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-vp4670-uefi-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: vp4670
      - aem-setup:
          machine: vp4670
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: vp4670
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: vp4670
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v1-legacy-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: hpt630v1
      - aem-setup:
          machine: hpt630v1
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: hpt630v1
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: hpt630v1
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v1-uefi-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: hpt630v1
      - aem-setup:
          machine: hpt630v1
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: hpt630v1
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: hpt630v1
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v2-legacy-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: hpt630v2
      - aem-setup:
          machine: hpt630v2
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: hpt630v2
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: hpt630v2
    qubesos-4.2.3-install-iso-hpt630v2-uefi-x86_64:
      - installation:
          machine: hpt630v2
      - aem-setup:
          machine: hpt630v2
      - aem-first-run:
          machine: hpt630v2
      - aem-second-run:
          machine: hpt630v2

TestSuites.description: Install the system and shut it down.  Separate test suite for clarity.  UEFI=1 is a workaround.
TestSuites.name: installation

TestSuites.description: Clear TPM, install AEM packages and setup AEM.
TestSuites.name: aem-setup

TestSuites.description: Check that AEM unsealed secret successfully and dump TPM event log.
TestSuites.name: aem-second-run

TestSuites.description: Check that AEM sealed secret successfully.
TestSuites.name: aem-first-run
